Professional writing marketplace

Access verified writing assignments and grow your freelance profile.

A dynamic writer platform with profiles, assignment pipelines, and admin-posted tasks. Writers can onboard, apply, collaborate on task threads, and track progress end-to-end. Lecturers can switch on guided classroom annotations with ?edu=true.

Workflow

End-to-end assignment workflow

01

Create your profile

Onboard with your expertise field and build your writer presence.

02

Apply and communicate

Open assignment briefs and coordinate through task threads.

03

Track delivery status

Move tasks from open to in-review to submitted with full timeline.

Payout operations

Transparent payout cycle

1. Task accepted

Writers confirm scope and due date before work begins.

2. Quality review

Assignments are reviewed against requirements and quality checks.

3. Weekly settlement

Approved tasks are batched into weekly payout summaries.

Writer success stories

The task briefs are detailed and the status workflow keeps delivery organized.

Angela N., Research Writer

I can track every assignment from application to submission without confusion.

Kelvin M., Business Analyst

Threaded instructions make revisions clear and turnaround times much faster.

Fatma A., Medical Writer

Frequently asked questions

How do I start receiving tasks?

Create a writer profile, verify your account tier, and apply to open assignments.

How are deadlines managed?

Each task includes a due date and update checkpoints in your dashboard timeline.

Can I talk to admin on each task?

Yes. Use the task thread in each assignment to receive instructions and clarifications.

How do I export my activity?

Use the dashboard export actions to download CSV or print your records as PDF.

This frontend-only dashboard lets an educator add assignments and watch simulated activation revenue rise. Data is stored in the browser until the backend is wired in.
